web.title: Models overview - Claude API Docs
web.description: Claude is a family of state-of-the-art large language models developed by Anthropic. This guide introduces the available models and compares their performance.

web.title: Introducing Claude 4 - Anthropic
web.description: Claude Opus 4 is the world's best coding model, with sustained performance on complex, long-running tasks and agent workflows.
